default_strike.text:
Unique mortal with 3 life. 0 strength, 0 bleed.
Wendell can strike: 2R damage. He inflicts +2 damage with melee weapons. He gets 1 optional maneuver each combat. He can enter combat with any minion as a (D) action. If Wendell has 2 or less life during your unlock phase, he gains 1 life. During your unlock phase, Wendell inflicts 2 unpreventable damage on a ready vampire you control.
